Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Terminating Sanctions And Req. For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-08-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Elizabeth Pacheco, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Dezebee Miles

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Dezebee Miles' motion for terminating sanctions is granted. No opposition has been filed. The Court finds that further orders would not result in compliance. The motion for monetary sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Dec-26-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL MELVIN CAESAR BELLI'S (OF COUNSEL, THE CARTWRIGHT LAW FIRM) MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL OF RECORD ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF CHEYENNE CALOVINI.
APPEARANCES: MELVIN CAESAR BELLI, ESQUIRE (BELLI LAW FIRM, 415.981.8300) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. THERE ARE NO OTHER APPEARANCES.
RULING: DISCUSSED AND THE COURT GRANTS SAID MOTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2007 Continued To Feb-13-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION
Off Calendar Dec-10-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Dezebee Miles' motion to compel attendance at deposition is Granted.
No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to contact counsel for defendant to schedule the deposition at a mutually convenient time. The deposition shall be completed by December 31, 2007. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $530 shall be paid by plaintiff within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Dec-10-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Dezebee Miles' motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories, request for statement of damages, and request for production of documents is Granted.
No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $280 shall be paid by plaintiff within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2007 Set For Trial On Mar-17-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Feb-27-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 504

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
